description_long: This object consists of a collection of stylized flowers and foliage, arranged in a loose group with a variety of colors including orange, blue, purple, and green. The flowers have distinct, pointed petals that radiate outward in a star-like or whorled pattern, with some blossoms appearing more open and others partially closed. The petals are smooth and slightly curved, giving a soft, organic appearance. Several green leaves, mostly lanceolate in shape, are interspersed among the flowers, and some are grouped in tufts. The flowers are depicted with short, visible stems, and the arrangement includes a small patch of brown soil or ground base. The overall composition suggests a decorative flower bed or garden patch suitable for urban parks or landscaped areas.
description: A colorful group of stylized flowers with pointed petals and green lanceolate leaves, arranged on a small patch of soil. The flowers are orange, blue, and purple, with a soft, organic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full arrangement of flowers and leaves, with the soil base and the variety of petal colors most visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the profile of the flowers and the tufts of green leaves, with the petals' pointed shapes clearly outlined.
description_view_2: From this angle, the radial arrangement of the petals and the layering of the flowers are more apparent, as well as the distribution of colors.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the back of the soil patch and the stems, with the flowers' petals and leaves extending outward.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled pattern, with each flower displaying a star-like symmetry. Petals overlap slightly at the base and radiate outward evenly from the center.
